title: townsendia annua
intro: Townsendia annua, also known as Annual Townsendia, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Townsendia annua include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Townsendia annua can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
